accurate.why: All claims are supported by the resolution text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the description of the Congressional Review Act is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: disapproving the FHWA's Buy America waiver rule for EV chargers.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes that the resolution would nullify the rule rather than directly amend the underlying Buy America statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution itself has no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: No effective dates stated, which is acceptable given the resolution's simple structure.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision: disapproval of the FHWA rule.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for a simple joint resolution.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies FHWA and the Federal Register citation.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (88 Fed. Reg. 10619) and February 21, 2023 publication date are correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
